description_long: This is a shallow, round ceramic bowl with a wide rim and a gently sloping profile. The interior features a colorful, hand-painted floral motif with fruits and leaves in shades of yellow, red, green, and orange, giving it a traditional, artisanal appearance. The rim is adorned with a repeating blue and white geometric border, adding a decorative accent that contrasts with the central artwork. The exterior of the bowl is a solid, warm ochre color, providing a subtle backdrop to the more intricate interior design. The surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glazed ceramics. This bowl is likely intended for serving food and would be a decorative addition to a dining or kitchen setting.
description: A shallow, round ceramic bowl with a hand-painted floral and fruit motif inside and a blue geometric border on the rim. The exterior is ochre-colored and the surface is glossy and smooth.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from an angle highlighting the central floral motif and the blue geometric rim, with the ochre exterior visible underneath.
description_view_1: This view shows more of the right side of the bowl, revealing additional floral details and the continuous rim pattern.
description_view_2: The left side of the bowl is more prominent, with the floral motif and rim pattern still clearly visible, and the ochre base in shadow.
description_view_3: The bowl is rotated to show the opposite side, displaying a different section of the floral motif and the consistent rim design.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Hand-painted floral and fruit motif in the center, with a blue and white geometric border around the rim.
